review_text: {"verdict":"CHANGES_REQUESTED","summary":"The Maker lane is largely well-bounded: dispatch-only, read-only GITHUB_TOKEN, pinned actions, opaque ticket, paused-by-default packet, no-tools model, schema/secret/markup/mention validation, duplicate-marker and budget rechecks, and real tests replacing the prior vacuous duplicate-diff test. However, one P2 remains open: build_embedded_prompt writes attacker-influenced multiline CURRENT.md content (fetched from the Season 2 repo) into GITHUB_ENV via core.append_github_env, whose delimiter safety is outside this diff; if the delimiter is predictable, a poisoned document could inject env vars (e.g. PYTHONPATH/PYTHONSTARTUP) into later credential-bearing steps. Cannot approve with this unproven.","findings":[{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"u1-claude-maker.yml emit-prompt-env writes U1_MAKER_PROMPT, containing untrusted multiline CURRENT.md fetched from the Season 2 repo, to $GITHUB_ENV via core.append_github_env. append_github_env is not in this diff, so heredoc-delimiter collision resistance is unproven. A crafted CURRENT.md line matching the delimiter could inject arbitrary env vars into subsequent steps that hold SEASON2_REVIEW_TOKEN (e.g. PYTHONPATH/PYTHONSTARTUP hijack of the recheck/publish python3 invocations). Diff must show or add a per-invocation random delimiter with collision fail-closed, plus a test."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"The bridge duplicate-diff guard now permits a second call whenever requested_model differs (scripts/local_claude_bridge.py reserve_attempt). No allowlist of approved models is enforced in this diff; the 'at most one call per approved model' claim in README/SECURITY depends on unverified validation elsewhere. Arbitrary requested_model strings would allow repeated calls on the same diff, bounded only by the 6/window and 12/day caps. Legacy None-model entries correctly remain fail-closed."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"The inline --json-schema string in u1-claude-maker.yml duplicates schemas/u1-maker-output.schema.json but no test asserts they stay identical; drift would silently change the model-side contract while validate_result still gates publication. Also '--tools \"\"' is not an evidently valid Claude CLI flag alongside --disallowedTools; if rejected the run fails closed, but the intended no-tools guarantee rests mainly on --disallowedTools and should be verified."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"Review and Maker workflows now share concurrency group u1-claude-opaque-ticket-global with cancel-in-progress false. GitHub keeps at most one pending run per group, so a queued review can be silently superseded by a queued Maker dispatch (or vice versa). This is availability-only and fail-closed, but the deduplication behavior is undocumented in SECURITY.md."},{"severity":"P3","status":"closed","finding":"MENTION_RE is not applied to proposed_content, but the rendered comment wraps it in a ~~~markdown fence (render_proposal), and GitHub does not resolve mentions inside code fences; validate_result also rejects ~~~, <!--, -->, CR, and other control chars, preventing fence escape and marker forgery. Considered adequately mitigated."}],"verification":["config/u1-maker.json ships status proposed_paused with an all-false activation block; validate_config plus require_active deny validate-ticket and every credentialed command until a separately approved packet lands.","The workflow is workflow_dispatch-only with a single numeric opaque ticket input, permissions actions:read/contents:read, persist-credentials:false, SHA-pinned actions matching config action_pins, and run_attempt==1 gates on both jobs.","resolve_dispatch_ticket and verify_remote_state bind the ticket to a live in_progress reservation run, exact trusted source SHA, fixed Issue #10, fixed branch/path, no open pilot PR, window bounds, and a unique non-expired artifact; recheck compares live state to the model-bound metadata before render and publish.","validate_result enforces the exact five-field schema, 20000-byte cap, secret-pattern, control-markup, mention, and unchanged-proposal rejection; publish requires the trusted proposal marker prefix and Base SHA line and posts only an issue comment.","verify_run_budget fail-closes on incomplete ledgers, enforces the 6-operation cap and one-use tickets, and rejects non-opaque run titles.","test_u1_maker.py and updated bridge/executor tests exercise paused denial, drift denial, budget exhaustion, PR-present denial, forbidden content, single-file workspace reads, and per-model duplicate handling; quality-gate.sh now compiles/validates/tests the new files and extends the read-only and dispatch-only greps to the Maker workflow."],"requirement_coverage":["Fail-closed default: paused packet, GateError denials, and broad exception-to-INVALID handling in main().","Budget and one-use ticket enforcement via reservation ledger, public run ledger, and per-pilot caps.","Credential containment: read-only GITHUB_TOKEN asserted by grep and tests; publication uses the pre-existing Issues-scoped Season 2 token; no contents/PR write introduced.","Model containment: fixed prompt, delimited untrusted evidence, disallowed tool list, strict schema, output never logged per workflow design.","Test honesty: the previously vacuous duplicate-diff test now actually exercises reserve_attempt, including a legacy fail-closed case.","Not fully covered: GITHUB_ENV delimiter safety for untrusted content (open P2) and model-allowlist backing for the per-model duplicate relaxation (open P3)."],"residual_risk":["core.append_github_env, SECRET_PATTERNS, clean_text, decode_content, and api_json are out-of-diff dependencies; their correctness is assumed, and the P2 env-injection question hinges on the first.","A Season 2 repository administrator or the executor repo admin can still alter bindings; documented as residual administrative risk.","Publish has a small TOCTOU window between the final verify_remote_state and the comment POST; impact is at most one duplicate bounded proposal comment.","Rendered proposals may contain arbitrary markdown links inside the fence; external_communication remains a policy statement, not a technical control."]}
reason: Unstructured Claude output is useful feedback but can never authorize approval.
